theme: First night in SF — the YC co-working space at 11pm
premise: You crash at the YC space your first night in San Francisco. Three people you don't know yet are already there — a competitor's CEO at the espresso machine, a founder who wants to be your cofounder, and a partner emeritus pretending not to listen.

scenes.setting: the YC co-working space, 11pm Tuesday, kitchen island with a half-eaten sourdough loaf

cast.name: Maya
cast.blurb: Ex-Stripe engineer, three coffees deep, has a deck about you on her laptop she made on the BART ride over.

scenes.beat: A founder you barely know corners you at the kitchen island and pitches herself as your missing cofounder. She has equity terms drafted.
scenes.imagePrompt: interior of a YC co-working space kitchen at night, warm fluorescent overhead, a young woman with a hoodie and laptop leaning across a kitchen island toward the founder, two-shot, cinematic, shallow depth

scenes.setting: the same YC space, the espresso machine in the back hallway, ten minutes later

cast.name: Brandon
cast.blurb: CEO of a startup doing what you do but with $4M and a year's head start. Knows your name.

scenes.beat: You bump into the competitor's CEO at the espresso machine. He greets you by name and asks how the runway is holding up.
scenes.imagePrompt: espresso machine in a back hallway of a co-working space, two men in their late 20s, one in expensive streetwear, one in a t-shirt, cinematic two-shot, golden lamplight

scenes.setting: a corner couch in the same YC space, midnight, partner emeritus reading a book they were never reading

cast.name: Linda
cast.blurb: Partner emeritus at YC. Has watched 200 startups fail. Knows you walked in tonight.

scenes.beat: A partner emeritus you didn't know was watching closes her book and asks if you've eaten. The question is a test.
scenes.imagePrompt: interior of a co-working space common area at midnight, an older woman with reading glasses on a corner couch closing a hardback book, founder approaching, soft warm lighting

scenes.setting: the empty mezzanine of the YC space, 2am, a single light still on at your laptop

cast.name: Maya
cast.blurb: Same as scene 0 — she didn't leave. She's two desks away pretending to work.

scenes.beat: Everyone else has cleared out. Maya is still here. She walks over, asks if you've decided.
scenes.imagePrompt: interior mezzanine of an empty co-working space at 2am, one desk lamp on, a woman walking toward a seated founder with a closed laptop on her arm, long shadows
